title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 2
description: 40 alchemical emblems from the Bibliotheque des sages manuscript, Rosarium philosophorum hermaphrodite engravings, Urbigerus' chymical writings, and emblems of the conjunctio, the green lion devouring the sun, the philosophical egg, and the Mercurial serpent.
notes: Emphasis on conjunctio imagery — the alchemical wedding of opposites.
